message:
docs(bench): update @logic_table benchmarks to reflect real compiled Python

- bench_logic_table.zig: Change from "hand-written Zig" to "@logic_table
  (compiled Python)" - now uses REAL Python for loops compiled by metal0
- bench_inprocess.zig: Add clear documentation that @logic_table is real
  compiled Python from benchmarks/vector_ops.py, not fake SIMD code
- Update all labels and summaries to be honest about what's being measured
